name: Amazon Essentials Women's Classic-Fit Long Sleeve V-Neck T-Shirt
desc: A classic essential V-neck tee in soft cotton. Classic fit with clean lines perfect for everyday styling and layering.

name: Levi's Women's Classic Straight Jeans
desc: Relaxed through hip and thigh with a straight leg. Sits at the waist for a timeless look that pairs well with anything.

name: Daily Ritual Women's Terry Cotton and Modal Blend Relaxed Fit Hoodie
desc: Incredibly soft modal blend hoodie with a relaxed fit. Cozy enough for lounging, stylish enough for errands.

name: GRACE KARIN Women's Floral Swing A-Line Dress Short Sleeve
desc: Floral print swing dress with a flattering A-line silhouette. Short sleeves and a flowy skirt perfect for warm days and occasions.

name: Amazon Essentials Women's Relaxed Fit Fleece Pullover Sweatshirt
desc: Soft fleece pullover with a relaxed, cozy fit. Crew neck design in a range of versatile colors for everyday comfort.

name: Lee Women's Legendary Slim Straight Jean
desc: Slim straight leg with a high rise for a flattering silhouette. Stretch denim provides all-day comfort and shape retention.

name: Dokotoo Women's Oversized Ribbed Turtleneck Chunky Knit Sweater
desc: Oversized turtleneck sweater in a chunky ribbed knit. Warm, cozy, and on-trend for the cooler seasons.

name: Amazon Essentials Women's Jersey Slim-Fit Cropped Pant
desc: Slim-fit cropped pants in stretch jersey fabric. Comfortable elastic waist with a polished look for office or casual outings.

name: Daily Ritual Women's Ponte Knit Long-Sleeve Fit-and-Flare Dress
desc: Ponte knit fit-and-flare dress with long sleeves. Structured fabric holds its shape while the flared skirt adds feminine flair.

name: Under Armour Women's HeatGear Armour High-Waisted Leggings
desc: High-waisted compression leggings with HeatGear fabric that wicks sweat and dries fast. Flatlock seams prevent chafing.
